# Dated lesson

The ledger writer assumed the index was fresh.[^7]

## Notes and lessons learned

[^7]: [ocd:2025-03-03 lmd:2026-05-05 class:reference] the index lagged the
  writes; lesson: re-read after a debounce, never assume the index is current.
